mapper.sql: A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.NBITMASK , A.SNETMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY , A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.NCNT, A.NCLASS_CNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT , A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD AS SIP_CREATE_SEQ_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , C.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , D.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , E.SUSER_NM AS SCREATE_NM , F.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM
, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_NM , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , A.SCREATE_NM , A.SMODIFY_NM
, MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_USER_BAS E , MST.TB_USER_BAS F

AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = C.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = D.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SCREATE_ID = E.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = F.SUSER_ID(+)

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD DESC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NBITMASK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD DESC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT
, H.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , I.SLVL_NM as SSVC_OBJ_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST A
, MST.TB_LVL_MST G , MST.TB_LVL_CD H , MST.TB_LVL_CD I
AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = G.NLVL_MST_SEQ(+) AND G.SSVC_GROUP_CD = H.SLVL_CD(+) AND G.SSVC_OBJ_CD = I.SLVL_CD(+)
SELECT DISTINCT(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD) FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD LIKE #{value} || '%'

choose.when: SELECT COUNT(NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ) AS CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND ( (NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR >= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NLAST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ) AND SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CT0005') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = #{sipVersionTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}

SELECT COUNT(NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ) AS CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND ( (NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR >= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NLAST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ) AND SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CT0004', 'CT0005') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = #{sipVersionTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}
choose.otherwise: SELECT COUNT(NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ) AS CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND ( (NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR >= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NFIRST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NLAST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) OR (NFIRST_ADDR >= #{nfirstAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND NLAST_ADDR <= #{nlastAddr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ) AND SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CT0005') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = #{sipVersionTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}

mapper.select: SELECT MAX(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD) AS NEW_SEQ FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD),1,7) || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(RIGHT(MAX(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD),3)) + 1, '000')) AS SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTR(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD,1,1) = (SELECT SUBSTR(SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM,1,1) FROM MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD WHERE SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}) AND SUBSTR(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD,2,6) = (SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL) UNION SELECT SUBSTR(SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM,1,1) || (SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL) || '001' FROM MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD WHERE SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} )

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.V_TB_IP_RESERVED A WHERE 1=1
AND A.PIP_PREFIX >>= #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}
